raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Assembly passed AB 13 to demand greater accountability from the California Public Utilities Commission (CPUC).",
    "PG&E reported $2.47 billion in profits in 2024, including $86 million paid out to shareholders.",
    "The CPUC approved six rate increases for PG&E customers in the past year.",
    "AB 13 creates a new process for how the CPUC reviews and approves rate increases.",
    "AB 13 mandates that CPUC commissioners be appointed based on geographic districts to ensure broader representation.",
    "AB 13 adds a commissioner with a background in public advocacy or public interest law to the CPUC.",
    "AB 13 requires the CPUC to disclose delays in rate-setting cases.",
    "AB 13 mandates annual reports to the Legislature on rate affordability and pending decisions."
  ]
}
```
